use_cases: Landing page hero section featuring an animated 3D globe
Tech or SaaS product showcase with interactive wireframe visualization
Creative portfolio intro with rotating globe element
Background for marketing pages needing 3D visual interest
Interactive hero for crypto or global network-themed products
ai_summary: A full-screen hero component featuring a rotating wireframe globe rendered with React Three Fiber. The globe uses transparent mesh materials with HSL CSS variable colors and continuous rotation animation via useFrame, creating a minimalist 3D visual effect suitable for tech, SaaS, or developer-focused landing pages.
